evidence.snippet:
### [**Remote Drone Surveillance**](https://www.americansecurityforce.com/remote-surveillance-technology/surveillance-drones/)
Our [surveillance drones](https://www.americansecurityforce.com/remote-surveillance-technology/surveillance-drones/) offer rapid deployment, live HD video streaming, and intelligent tracking. They are perfect for wide-area and hard-to-reach security coverage. Supported by autonomous drone docking stations, these units ensure 24/7 protection with minimal manual intervention.

*   Fast-response aerial surveillance
*   360° high-definition video & thermal imaging
*   Real-time alerts and autonomous patrol paths

items.notes: Aerial surveillance drones with HD video and thermal imaging operated as a security service; company designs its own autonomous drones in-house.

evidence.snippet: *   Weather-resistant drone docking stations with autonomous charging

items.notes: Remote drone docking stations with autonomous charging; monitoring and response center operations.

products_categories.notes: Drone product pages were skipped in crawl; secondary categories may be incomplete.

evidence.snippet: Established in 1999, **[American Security Force](/)** is a leading provider of specialized security solutions. Headquartered in Los Angeles, CA, the company is committed to safeguarding clients’ assets with a comprehensive range of security services.

### [**Remote Drone Surveillance**](https://www.americansecurityforce.com/remote-surveillance-technology/surveillance-drones/)
Our [surveillance drones](https://www.americansecurityforce.com/remote-surveillance-technology/surveillance-drones/) offer rapid deployment, live HD video streaming, and intelligent tracking. They are perfect for wide-area and hard-to-reach security coverage. Supported by autonomous drone docking stations, these units ensure 24/7 protection with minimal manual intervention.

We provide a wide range of security services, including surveillance, video monitoring, access control, intrusion detection, and drone operation. We also employ trained security guards who can be either stationed at a single location or conduct patrols through a predefined route.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Primary business is operating surveillance drones for security clients; also has in-house R&D drone engineer designing autonomous drones (resource-0005 line 138-139), but the customer-facing model is service delivery.

products.notes: Drone-specific product pages were skipped during crawl; full product details not confirmed. Company also operates Mobile Surveillance Trailers and Sentinel Surveillance (non-UXV).

evidence.snippet: As a leading security company in California and the surrounding states, we provide a range of services. All of them have the same goal: keeping you and your property secure. Our most requested service for 2025 was:
With 25 years in the security industry, our depth of knowledge ensures that we’re prepared for any situation.

readiness.notes: 25-year-old company with nationwide active drone surveillance operations; services available for immediate deployment.

unresolved_questions: Whether ASF manufactures and sells its autonomous drones commercially (as OEM) vs. solely using them for in-house surveillance services
Whether any NDAA Section 848/889 compliance applies to drone hardware used/sold
Whether ASF's related brand dronepatrol.com operates independently with its own product line

fetch_requests.reason: Would confirm specific drone models/SKUs, whether they are OEM-built or third-party, and any NDAA/compliance claims for drone hardware.
Would provide details on the drone docking station product, including whether it is manufactured or resold, supporting product and supply chain role assessment.

tagline: Los Angeles–based provider of autonomous surveillance drones, patented drone-docking stations, mobile surveillance trailers, and 24/7 monitoring-center services for perimeter security. Also offers fixed video systems, access control, fire/intrusion monitoring, and cybersecurity. NDAA and Blue UAS certification status unknown. Public evidence of government or allied-sector contracts is thin.
